name: betterbrowse
description: Run BetterBrowse audits and review local UI quality reports.

interface.shortDescription: Audit local React and Next.js apps.
interface.longDescription: Launch a local browser, inspect routes, report conservative UI quality issues, and generate diff-first fixes.
defaultPrompt: Audit my local dashboard route with BetterBrowse.
Fix the highest-confidence spacing issue from the latest BetterBrowse report.
Summarize BetterBrowse findings for mobile layout problems.
